pages.text: $(bold)Cached Production$() is the core feature of FPSCompress.$(br2)It allows factories to run "virtually" using math instead of loading chunks.$(br2)$(bold)Result:$() Massive TPS improvement (10-20+ per factory)

pages.title: How It Works
pages.text: $(bold)Phase 1: Measurement (SIMULATING)$()$(br)PreFab counts resources transported over 30-60 seconds$(br2)Example: 128 iron in 600 ticks = 0.213 iron/tick$(br2)$(bold)Phase 2: Simulation (CACHED)$()$(br)PreFab uses fractional math to simulate production

pages.title: Fractional Math
pages.text: Most factories produce < 1 item/tick:$(br2)$(bold)Example:$() 0.213 iron/tick$(br)Tick 1-4: Accumulate (0.213 + 0.213...)$(br)Tick 5: accumulator = 1.065 → Push 1 iron$(br2)Remainder (0.065) carries to next tick.

pages.title: Chunk Unloading
pages.text: During CACHED mode:$(br2)$(li)CM dimension chunks $(bold)UNLOAD$()$(li)Machines stop ticking$(li)PreFab runs simple math$(li)TPS improves dramatically$(br2)Check with F3 screen - "C:" value should be lower.

pages.title: Accuracy Tips
pages.text: $(bold)For accurate rates:$()$(br2)$(li)Simulate for 60+ seconds$(li)Keep inputs stocked during measurement$(li)Let factory reach steady state$(li)Avoid player interference$(br2)Longer simulation = more accurate rates.
